AC7D7225B314E74A312BAFEB6E9F2E98:
The image displays a translucent white plastic shopping bag with handles at the top. The bag has visible folds and creases.

Centered towards the top of the bag, the text "Volte Sempre!" is written in a playful, handwritten-style blue cursive font.

Below this text, there is a vibrant green horizontal banner with a wavy, ribbon-like shape, featuring pointed ends extending slightly outwards on both sides. Inside this banner, the text "AGRADECEMOS A PREFERÊNCIA" is written in white, sans-serif, uppercase letters.

Directly below the green banner, a large, solid blue icon of a hand giving a thumbs-up gesture is centrally placed, with the hand facing slightly to the right.

Below the thumbs-up icon, a thin, curved green line forms a wide, upward-curving arc, resembling a smile, with its ends extending horizontally outwards.

In the bottom left corner of the central panel, inside the green arc, a standard recycling symbol (three chasing arrows forming a triangle) is depicted in solid blue.

To the right of the recycling symbol, in the bottom right corner of the central panel, small, black, sans-serif text is arranged in four lines:
Empresa
Amiga
Do Meio
Ambiente.
AC011186925272411497A8F4B422E702:
Here is the transcription and detailed description of the image:

**Text:**
Volte Sempre!
AGRADECEMOS A PREFERÊNCIA
Empresa
Amiga
Do Meio
Ambiente.

**Visual Content:**
The image displays a translucent white plastic shopping bag, typical of retail use, with two handles at the top. The bag has a slight sheen and subtle creases, indicating its material.

Centered on the upper half of the bag, the phrase "Volte Sempre!" is written in a flowing, dark blue cursive script.

Below this text, a horizontal green banner, shaped like a ribbon with pointed ends, spans across the width of the bag. On this banner, the text "AGRADECEMOS A PREFERÊNCIA" is written in white, uppercase, sans-serif letters.

Directly beneath the green banner, a large, solid dark blue icon of a hand giving a thumbs-up gesture is prominently featured. The thumb is pointing upwards, and the hand is positioned centrally.

Encircling the lower part of the thumbs-up icon, a thin, bright green curved line forms a wide, upward-arching semi-circle, resembling a smile. The ends of this green line extend horizontally outwards from the curve.

In the bottom left corner of the bag, there is a dark blue recycling symbol, composed of three chasing arrows forming a triangle. To the immediate right of this symbol, the text "Empresa Amiga Do Meio Ambiente." is stacked in three lines, written in a small, black, sans-serif font.

3.  **Thumbs-Up Icon:** Centered below the green banner, a large, solid dark blue icon of a hand giving a thumbs-up gesture is depicted.
